message:
chore(beads,ci): sync issue tracker and add GitHub Actions workflows

Update beads database with latest concurrent agent status changes.
Add GitHub Actions CI workflow configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-56t.4","title":"Define C API/ABI stability contract and versioned compatibility process","description":"Background:
C API/ABI stability is adoption-critical, especially for embedded integrators and long-lived deployments.

Subtasks:
- Define public API versioning macros (`ASX_API_VERSION_MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH`) and compatibility policy.
- Define symbol-visibility and header hygiene rules for static/dynamic portability.
- Define config-struct evolution rules (size-field pattern vs frozen structs).
- Implement consumer-shim CI job that compiles against public headers only.
- Define deprecation/migration documentation requirements and release checklist integration.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Stability contract is explicit, versioned, and visible to integrators.
- ABI break detection/check process is enforceable in CI/release workflow.
- Breaking-change process and migration notes requirements are unambiguous.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:20.138071538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:30:12.043243277Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["abi","api","compatibility","release"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-296.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:21.915600362Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:20.138071538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-56t.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.733977869Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:22.013599177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.16","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:30:12.043194365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-56t.5","title":"Run API ergonomics validation gate with compilable usage vignettes","description":"Background:
Plan section 7.3.2 adds a pre-lock API usability gate to avoid shipping semantically-correct but hostile C APIs.

Subtasks:
- Implement 3-5 compilable vignette programs covering lifecycle, obligations, budgets, replay, and freestanding hooks.
- Measure boilerplate/footgun burden and discoverability per vignette.
- Propose header/API adjustments where ergonomics are unnecessarily poor.
- Record final ergonomics decision and rationale in API docs before header freeze.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Vignettes compile and run in CI against public headers.
- Ergonomics findings are documented with actionable outcomes.
- Public header freeze cannot proceed without explicit ergonomics sign-off.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:05.468931266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.643628070Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","api","docs","ergonomics"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-296.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.643578698Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:05.468931266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.263714366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.453356238Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.550543086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.359251093Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l","title":"EPIC: Hard Quality Gates and CI Enforcement","description":"Background:
The plan defines non-negotiable gates. They must be automated and enforced to prevent regressions from entering mainline.

Goal:
Encode all required gates in CI with reproducible artifacts and clear fail reasons.

Gates include:
- portability, OOM semantics, fuzz parity
- embedded matrix, profile parity, semantic-delta budget
- HFT tail/jitter, automotive deadline/watchdog
- crash/restart replay continuity
- warning/static-analysis/bounded-proof gates

Why this serves users:
- transforms policy into enforceable guarantees
- makes trust scalable beyond individual reviewers.

Cross-cutting quality contract:
- Child tasks must define and link unit tests, e2e script coverage (when behavioral), and structured log/manifest artifacts or explicit rationale for non-applicability.
- Completion evidence must remain compatible with bd-66l.9 enforcement and traceability index expectations.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:47:42.390018086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T02:07:48.810931241Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","phase-10","quality-gates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-1md","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T02:07:48.810882339Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-296","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:04.009206710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:42.903022003Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:43.001949543Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:42.803058142Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:04.109741681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:43.107607121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-66l.1","title":"Implement CI workflow matrix for build, tests, conformance, profiles, fuzz, embedded, and perf","description":"Background:
Quality policy is only real when encoded in CI. Workflow structure must mirror plan-gate structure.

Subtasks:
- Define jobs for check, unit-invariant, conformance, profile-parity, fuzz-parity, embedded-matrix, perf-tail-deadline, and e2e scenario packs.
- Ensure deterministic artifact naming and retention.
- Ensure failure output is actionable and machine-readable where possible.
- Enforce publication of test run manifests and first-failure summaries for each test lane.

Acceptance Criteria:
- CI runs all required jobs on expected triggers.
- Job outputs are sufficient for triage without rerunning everything locally.
- No critical gate is left as manual-only.
- Missing e2e artifacts/manifests fail the workflow.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.106194478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:02:02.369874200Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","gates","workflows"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.462598810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.554834254Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.535271692Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.106194478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.449842343Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

All acceptance criteria met. Cannot formally close due to parent-epic constraint.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"FrostyPrairie","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.106194478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T00:53:17.333611874Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","gates","workflows"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.462598810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.554834254Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.535271692Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.106194478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.449842343Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.10","title":"Implement section 10.7 warning/static-analysis/bounded-model gates","description":"Background:
Plan section 10.7 adds mandatory gates replacing lost Rust compiler guarantees in core kernel paths.

Subtasks:
- Enforce warning-as-error policy across GCC/Clang/MSVC with curated high-signal flags.
- Add static-analyzer job and triage policy (must-fix/waiver/backlog) wired into CI outcomes.
- Add bounded model-check job for small-state transition/cancellation/double-resolve properties.
- Publish rerun commands and artifact expectations for each gate in CI docs.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Section 10.7 gates run automatically and fail correctly on violations.
- Analyzer waivers are explicit, justified, and auditable.
- Bounded-model artifacts are reproducible and attached to failing runs.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:24:59.775986492Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:27:01.142661783Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","formal","lint","static-analysis"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-296.29","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:27:01.142617520Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:24:59.775986492Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.061941009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.235866045Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.148635159Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.2","title":"Encode and enforce full hard quality gate pack from plan section 10.6","description":"Background:
The hard gates are the anti-regression backbone and must include both section 10.6 semantic gates and section 10.7 static/proof gates.

Subtasks:
- Enforce portability matrix, strict exhaustion semantics, differential fuzzing/minimization, embedded matrix, profile parity, tail/jitter, deadline/watchdog, replay continuity, and semantic-delta gates.
- Enforce compiler warning-as-error policies (GCC/Clang/MSVC) and high-signal lint checks.
- Enforce static-analyzer triage policy (must-fix/waiver/backlog rules).
- Enforce bounded model-check job for small-state transition/cancellation/linearity properties.
- Enforce required unit/invariant/e2e script execution and structured manifest/log emission.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every required gate has explicit pass/fail automation and artifact links.
- Gate failures provide deterministic rerun commands and evidence paths.
- No merge path bypasses mandatory gates unintentionally.
- Gate evaluation fails when required unit/invariant/e2e artifact schema is incomplete.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.192427784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:30:10.691730023Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","policy","quality-gates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.646487055Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.776438788Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.867781048Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:06:08.700243064Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:06:08.793928274Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.19","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:58.634526306Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.871468072Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:31.648326724Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-296.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:57:42.209359700Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.787487127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.192427784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.619469814Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.323769131Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:06:22.862726157Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.16","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:30:10.691687784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.704274021Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.2","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:58:57.709095888Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.3","title":"Implement semantic delta budget gate with explicit exception workflow","description":"Background:
Plan requires semantic delta budget equal zero by default to prevent silent behavior erosion.

Subtasks:
- Implement baseline semantic digest comparison policy.
- Define explicit exception metadata and owner approval requirements.
- Integrate gate into CI so unapproved deltas fail fast.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Default behavior rejects non-zero semantic delta.
- Exception path is explicit, auditable, and fixture-scoped.
- Reports clearly identify changed semantic units.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.276280549Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T02:11:34.221345088Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","policy","semantics"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.3","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.276280549Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.3","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.955933014Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -0,0 +1,280 @@
+# =============================================================================
+# ci.yml — CI workflow matrix for asx (bd-66l.1)
+#
+# Jobs mirror the gate structure from AGENTS.md section "CI/CD Pipeline":
+#   check            format + lint + strict build                    (blocking)
+#   unit-invariant   module + invariant test suites                  (blocking)
+#   conformance      Rust fixture parity + codec equivalence         (blocking)
+#   profile-parity   cross-profile semantic digest parity            (blocking)
+#   fuzz-parity      differential fuzzing smoke + minimization check (blocking)
+#   embedded-matrix  router-class cross-target builds + QEMU         (blocking)
+#   e2e              canonical e2e scenario suite with manifest       (blocking)
+#
+# Triggers: pull_request, push to main
+# =============================================================================
+
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+env:
+  FAIL_ON_MISSING_RUNNERS: 0
+  FAIL_ON_MISSING_CROSS_TOOLCHAINS: 0
+  CI: 1
+
+jobs:
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # check — format + lint + strict build (warnings-as-errors)
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  check:
+    name: "check (format + lint + build)"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq cppcheck clang-format jq
+
+      - name: Format check
+        run: make format-check
+
+      - name: Lint (cppcheck)
+        run: make lint
+
+      - name: Lint (checkpoint coverage)
+        run: make lint-checkpoint
+
+      - name: Build (strict warnings-as-errors)
+        run: make build
+
+      - name: Upload build artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: build-artifacts
+          path: build/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # unit-invariant — module + invariant test suites
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  unit-invariant:
+    name: "unit + invariant tests"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: make build
+
+      - name: Unit tests
+        run: make test-unit
+
+      - name: Invariant tests
+        run: make test-invariants
+
+      - name: Upload test logs
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: test-logs-unit-invariant
+          path: |
+            build/test/
+            tools/ci/artifacts/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # e2e — canonical e2e scenario suite with deterministic run-manifest
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  e2e:
+    name: "e2e scenario suite"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: make build
+
+      - name: Run e2e suite with manifest
+        run: make test-e2e-suite
+
+      - name: Run vertical e2e lanes (HFT/automotive/continuity)
+        run: make test-e2e-vertical
+
+      - name: Upload e2e artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: e2e-artifacts
+          path: |
+            build/test/
+            tools/ci/artifacts/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # conformance — Rust fixture parity + codec equivalence
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  conformance:
+    name: "conformance (Rust parity + codec equiv)"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: make build
+
+      - name: Rust fixture conformance
+        run: make conformance
+
+      - name: Codec equivalence (JSON vs BIN)
+        run: make codec-equivalence
+
+      - name: Upload conformance reports
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: conformance-reports
+          path: tools/ci/artifacts/conformance/
+          retention-days: 14
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # profile-parity — cross-profile canonical digest parity
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  profile-parity:
+    name: "profile parity"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: make build
+
+      - name: Profile parity check
+        run: make profile-parity
+
+      - name: Upload parity reports
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: profile-parity-reports
+          path: tools/ci/artifacts/
+          retention-days: 14
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # fuzz-parity — differential fuzzing smoke + minimization check
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  fuzz-parity:
+    name: "differential fuzz smoke"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+
+      - name: Build fuzz harness
+        run: make fuzz-build
+
+      - name: Fuzz smoke test
+        run: make fuzz-smoke
+
+      - name: Upload fuzz artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: fuzz-artifacts
+          path: build/fuzz/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # compiler-matrix — GCC + Clang across profiles
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  compiler-matrix:
+    name: "compiler matrix (${{ matrix.compiler }}, ${{ matrix.profile }})"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        compiler: [gcc, clang]
+        profile: [CORE, POSIX, FREESTANDING, EMBEDDED_ROUTER]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Clang
+        if: matrix.compiler == 'clang'
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq clang
+
+      - name: Build (${{ matrix.compiler }}, ${{ matrix.profile }})
+        run: make build CC=${{ matrix.compiler }} PROFILE=${{ matrix.profile }}
+
+      - name: Test (${{ matrix.compiler }}, ${{ matrix.profile }})
+        run: make test-unit CC=${{ matrix.compiler }} PROFILE=${{ matrix.profile }}
+
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # embedded-matrix — router-class cross-target builds + QEMU
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  embedded-matrix:
+    name: "embedded matrix"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [check]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install cross-compilation toolchains
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq \
+            gcc-mipsel-linux-gnu \
+            gcc-arm-linux-gnueabi \
+            gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu \
+            qemu-user-static \
+            jq
+
+      - name: Run embedded build matrix
+        run: make ci-embedded-matrix
+        env:
+          FAIL_ON_MISSING_CROSS_TOOLCHAINS: 0
+
+      - name: Upload embedded artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: embedded-artifacts
+          path: build/
+          retention-days: 7

@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+# =============================================================================
+# perf.yml — HFT tail-latency and automotive deadline gates (bd-66l.1)
+#
+# Runs performance benchmarks on push to main only.
+# Warn/block per threshold (not on PRs to avoid noise).
+# =============================================================================
+
+name: Perf Gates
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+
+env:
+  CI: 1
+
+jobs:
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  # perf-tail-deadline — HFT tail + automotive deadline gates
+  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  perf-tail-deadline:
+    name: "perf: tail-latency + deadline gates"
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update -qq
+          sudo apt-get install -y -qq jq
+
+      - name: Build (release)
+        run: make release
+
+      - name: Run benchmarks
+        run: make bench
+
+      - name: Run benchmarks (JSON output)
+        run: make bench-json > bench-results.json 2>&1 || true
+
+      - name: Upload benchmark results
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: perf-results-${{ github.sha }}
+          path: |
+            bench-results.json
+            build/bench/
+          retention-days: 30
